title: Bingo Net
description:
a Hypixel Skyblock helping Mod to connect to the Bingo Net Eco System.

Not useful outside of Hypixel Skyblock
body:
## This Mod is still under heavy development with a LOT of bugs / issues.
- Report these Issues back to me so I can fix them.

Due to me havinbg the long term plan to merge the changes into official sh there are some notes. While the mod is open source the Server is closed source. Some Developers feel stronly against SH not controlling (or even not having access to the source) due to which I added Third Party Warnings.

You can find most of the Bingo Net's actual Features in the config:
type sh /sh in chat
Go Into Events
Go Into Bingo
- Most of the local Settings
Go Into Third Party Bingo Networks
- Here are most of the Bingo Net Network Features.


Keep in mind that Bingo Net requires a link process since we require a Discord Account to store our Data on the connection between mcuuid and dcuserid. A lot of Features are also Discord Relevant, or users get shown broken Info if the User is not in the Discord.
